requirementCueLines: [Page 1] TEDUC 471 Equity & Diversity in Schools and the
[Page 1] TEDUC 482 Foundations of Education: Policy, Ethics, TEDUC 489 Field Experience III
[Page 1] TEDUC 490 Reflective Seminar: Essentials of Teaching
[Page 1] TEDUC 449 Teaching & Learning in Inclusive Settings 3
[Page 2] • Ability to pass a criminal background check and other state requirements before entering field placements
[Page 2] • Completion of all other program requirements**
[Page 2] * This major requires demonstrated content knowledge through completion of 45 credits of coursework in other academic
[Page 2] disciplines; lower division, transfer courses, and education electives may be used to fulfill these requirements, which
[Page 2] overlap with University Area of Knowledge requirements.
[Page 2] **Note that some program requirements are subject to change due to state/federal regulations.
